item.title:
JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 1h Jordan Spieth through 36 holes this week: *1-under-par *0 bogeys *4 double bogeys
He is
item.description:
Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 1h Jordan Spieth through 36 holes this week: *1-under-par *0 bogeys *4 double bogeys
He is the only player over the last 20 years on the PGA Tour to be under par, have 4+ doubles and 0 bogeys through 36 holes in any tournament. 11 36 534 38 mil

Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 1h En respuesta a @JustinRayGolf Thank you to follower @StefanScrafield for bringing this to my attention
I stopped digging at 20 years because I have a family 43 5 mil

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 1h Hogan at Merion. Nicklaus at Baltusrol. DeChambeau at Chapultepec. Cita LIV Golf @li
JosephLaMagna: Joseph LaMagna @JosephLaMagna · 3h We cannot lose Lost Marsh, one of the greatest Design Disasters in the world Cita PFT
item.description: Joseph LaMagna @JosephLaMagna · 3h We cannot lose Lost Marsh, one of the greatest Design Disasters in the world Cita PFT Commenter @PFTCommenter · 6h I can report that a couple hours ago I saw the bears ownership and Kevin Warren at lost marsh golf club in Hammond Indiana conducting some sort of important business meeting with security and suits and every thing. The golf course is directly adjacent to the proposed Indiana 17 16 1 mil 218 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 3h #DISCUSSION — Which club in your golf bag goes 150 yards? 604 70 337 211 mil
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 3h #DISCUSSION — Which club in your golf bag goes 150 yards? 604 70 337 211 mil
